name: Bean Soup, (the Worlds Best)
recipeIngredient: 1 package SMALL PK. SMALL WHITE BEANS
recipeInstructions:
1. IN A LARGE POT, COMBINE ALL INGREDIENTS EXCEPT THE BEANS.
2. BRING TO A BOIL AND THEN TURN DOWN TO SIMMER.
3. IN A SECOND POT WITH COLD WATER, ADD BEANS.
4. BRING BEANS TO A BOIL AND LET THEM COOL.
5. NOW POUR OFF WATER, ADD COOL WATER, AND BRING TO BOIL AGAIN.
6. LOWER HEAT TO MEDIUM AND ALLOW TO COOK FOR 2 1/2 HOURS OR UNTIL DONE. DO NOT SEASON BEANS WHILE COOKING!
7. WHEN BEANS ARE DONE, POUR OFF WATER AND RINSE BEANS.
8. ADD BEANS TO THE FIRST POT AND SIMMER FOR ANOTHER 1/2 HOUR.
